entry.title: Search Help to Custom Filter Field in "Manage Customer Line Items"
entry.content:
Hello @Andre_Fischer,

         I came across your reply related to one of the issues that I am facing and was wondering if you might be able to guide me on below. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/redefined-service-new-entityset-methods-did-not-get-created/qaq-p/11067796 

I am to make changes to "Manage Customer Line Items" OR FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS (Redefined) to accommodate custom field 'PARVW' OR 'Partner Function'. So far I have managed to

  1. add my custom field 'PARVW' to structure FAR_IFIARLINEITEM_EX.
  2. I was able to populate this field using method ITEMSET_GET_ENTITYSET. 

Now the problem :-

 After I added this field 'PARVW' to the filter, how do I provide the Search Help for the new custom field 'PARVW'? 

I tried to attach a search help H_TPAR to the new entity using  the solution I  found https://www.samplecodeabap.com/sap-segw-odata-mpc_ext-define-code-collection/ , but since this is a redefinition of standard service when I debug to check the newly added entity  cannot be accessed and since it cannot be accessed I cannot populate it.

Since it is allowed to add custom field to filters, I am hoping that there is probably a way to attach the search help to same. How can I get the filter to work for custom field 'PARVW'? 

Your help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Restrict Sales order to Client Catalogs in SAP Retail
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are in the process of deploying SAP Retail in our company, and I would like to know can we manage the following requirement: A client should only be able to order materials from catalogs assigned to them. Here are the details:

  • A catalog contains different materials.
  • The catalog should be assigned to the customer.
  • A catalog can be assigned to multiple customers.
  • A customer can have multiple catalogs assigned.
  • A customer can order only materials listed in the catalogs assigned to them.

    Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.

My pricing procedure has many conditions and most of them have requirements to be fulfilled.

If you read what I wrote then you know that none of the pricing conditions displays any red traffic light - in other words they seem to be OK - so please explain what exactly are you asking from me.

Thank you.

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content:
Tested, you are right. It would not even compile, since reference is not an internal table which I could select data into.

What you suggest is working, but I would need to refactor the whole class. 🙂

The most important for me is that I understand the reason why it_table TYPE STANDARD TABLE of CDS_view_entity is not compatible with the CDS_view_entity, when passed as a parameter. It IS compatible, in fact, but there is no way to declare the target variable dynamically as a table, at least not any I know.

I am tempted to try with RTTS now, but I need to move on and I will select the data in the calling program. I will get back to this problem later, and if I find a simple solution, I will let you know.

Thank you for the discussion!

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - How to create an action for uploading files
entry.content:
@danilo_apicella1 I do have the custom handler written in my code. But it is not triggered on the post call, I get the error before that itself.

I'm using CAP Java.

SS

entry.title: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor based on Storage Bin?
entry.content:
Hi SAP legends!

I'm trying to find a way to set Storage Bin value on Physical stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor. Any idea?

Any help is much appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Best,
Alexandros

So, solution applicable for  this Content-Type = multipart/mixed; boundary=cpi as well?

entry.title: Error when generating the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APPCREATE_PROG in SE38
entry.content:
Hi on-call experts.

I'm encountering the following issue when trying to generate the app SAP&SAM_2205 using the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APPCREATE_PROG. 

I followed all the steps in the installation guide while configuring the program, filled in all the mandatory fields, but when I attempt to run the program, I get directed to a Short Dump, as shown in the image below:

When checking the error log in SMICM, I come across the following error:

Could someone help me solve this issue so that I can successfully generate the SSAM application?

Thanks in advance.

SAP Service and Asset Manager SAP Mobile Services

entry.content:
Hi Jerry, thanks for the inputs. I tried to follow links shared by you but still there is lot of ambiguity.

When I tried to explore as you suggested I found the tenant where memory is more consumed. But it is my production server URL where I haven't a single transaction.

Please refer the image.

Then we find below image in ALM where it says data is outdated where its data collection is on.

 

Please help to understand the same.

Thanks,

 

Nitin

entry.title: Re: User principal certificate from trustworthy issuer is...
entry.content:
I know there are two certificates involved in the Principal Propagation scenario:

  1. The certificate used during TLS handshake between SCC and SAP backend system. This is called "system certificate" in the SCC. It needs to have "special" permissions in the SAP system, as otherwise the SAP system won't allow the system represented by the certificate to "impersonate" multiple different users via temporary certificates (as in point 2).
  2. Possibly multiple short-lived end-user certificates, which are used for login.

I am not completely sure, but the message

Accept trusted forwarded certificate (received via HTTPS with trusted certificate): subject="CN=pieter@xxx.com", issuer="CN=sapcc, EMAIL=pieter@xxx.com"

is a bit unclear to me. Is this the "system certificate" that is used to establish a trust relationship between SCC and backend, or is this a "user certificate" that is supposed to be used for login? Could it be that the "CN=pieter" certificate is accidentally used for both? I know that a certificate that is defined as "system certificate" cannot at the same time be used as a "user certificate". (I.e. the settings in icm/trusted_reverse_proxy_<x> overrule the CERTRULE settings.) Perhaps this can be a reason, why the certificate is ignored in the CERTRULE mapping?!

Where to look next? It might help to activate the SSL/TLS trace in the SCC and check, which certificates are actually exchanged, both in the handshake as well as in the CLIENT_CERT header field.

entry.title: Re: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hi @AdityaKapoor,

Add the KNA1 as an alias table(ZKAN1_1) and pass the KUNN2 = KUNNR in the new alias table ZKAN1_1 and take the required value.

Hope this helps!!!!

Thanks and Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Remote Client copy without Personal data (PA Tables)
entry.content:
I want to do a remote client copy from production system to development system and need help choosing the copy profile.
I need to copy all data except the users and personal tables (PA*). 

(First I will start a user export with SAP_USER profile and import them after the remote client copy).

Can anyone tell me which profile I should use in this case?
Thanks!

entry.title: 🚀Fire of Innovations: Highlights from SAP TechEd 2024 📢
entry.content:
The SAP TechEd 2024 event, themed “Fire of Innovations,” has once again set the stage for groundbreaking advancements in enterprise technology. Held virtually on October 8-9, this year’s conference showcased a plethora of new tools, updates, and strategies designed to empower businesses and developers alike. Here’s a deep dive into some of the most exciting announcements and innovations from the event.

1. Joule: The AI Copilot Revolution

One of the standout highlights was the unveiling of new capabilities for Joule, SAP’s generative AI copilot. Joule has been supercharged with collaborative AI agents that can perform complex, cross-disciplinary tasks. These agents are designed to break down silos within organizations, enhancing productivity and allowing human workers to focus on more creative and strategic activities.

For instance, in dispute management, autonomous AI agents can now analyze and resolve issues such as incorrect invoices or duplicate payments. In financial accounting, these agents streamline processes like bill payments and ledger updates, quickly addressing any inconsistencies.

2. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Enhancements

SAP continues to expand its Business Technology Platform (BTP), which is central to its cloud strategy. This year, SAP announced the expansion of BTP coverage through eight new SAP-managed data centers. Additionally, the SAP Discovery Center now offers a Quick-Account-Setup feature, enabling businesses to deploy specific use cases with just a click.

The integration of ABAP Cloud into SAP Build was another significant update. This integration allows developers to create and maintain ABAP Cloud projects directly from the SAP Build lobby, ensuring a seamless and efficient development process.

3. Innovations in SAP Build

SAP Build has been strengthened to support a “Clean Core” strategy, which is crucial for maintaining system consistency and upgradeability. The SAP Build Extensibility Wizard, introduced for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, helps both key users and developers create on-stack and side-by-side extensions in an embedded experience.

4. Harnessing the Power of Data with SAP Knowledge Graph

SAP introduced the SAP Knowledge Graph, a next-generation solution that connects SAP data with rich business context. This tool is poised to help developers unlock the full value of SAP data, driving more informed decision-making and innovation.

5. Global Reach and Accessibility

This year’s SAP TechEd was a truly global event, with a free two-day virtual format that included keynotes, technical sessions, and developer enablement activities. The event was designed to be accessible to a worldwide audience, ensuring that everyone could benefit from the latest SAP innovations.

Conclusion

SAP TechEd 2024 has once again demonstrated SAP’s commitment to driving innovation and empowering businesses with cutting-edge technology. From AI advancements with Joule to enhancements in SAP BTP and SAP Build, the “Fire of Innovations” theme truly encapsulates the transformative potential of these new tools and strategies. As businesses continue to navigate the complexities of the digital age, SAP’s innovations provide a robust foundation for growth and success.

Stay tuned for more updates and insights from SAP TechEd as we continue to explore the future of enterprise technology.

Feel free to share your thoughts or ask any questions about the event! What innovation are you most excited about?

entry.title: Course Announcement
entry.content:
Hello and welcome to the SAP Learning MOOC “Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP”.
The course starts on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, and we hope you enjoy taking part.

These are the video lectures you can look forward to:

  • Introducing the Main Concepts: AI Ethics at SAP
  • Explaining SAP's Guidelines and Policy: SAP's Global AI Ethics Framework
  • Governing AI Ethics at SAP: From Policy to Practice
  • Understanding Ethical Boundaries: When AI Goes Too Far
  • Ensuring Explainability in HR AI Systems: Transparent Decisions
  • Ensuring Fairness in HR AI Systems: Discrimination-Free Decisions
  • Managing Standard AI Use Cases: Ethics in Everyday AI
  • Integrating our Policy in the AI Lifecycle: AI Ethics Operationalization

After you’ve completed the course, you can take a quiz and earn a Record of Achievement.

We can’t wait to see you here in the course discussion forum, where you can exchange ideas about the content with other learners and submit questions to the experts!
You can only do this until Tuesday, December 10, 2024, so don´t miss this great opportunity to interact with other participants.

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog
(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor...
entry.content:
Hi 

We have another way 

Please check 

Go to transaction /SCWM/MON
Navigate to Stock and Bin -> Storage Bin
Enter the Storage Bin
Select option “Physical Stock”

If it works for you 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Build App and SAP ERP
entry.content: Good morning! I am using SAP ECC and currently the application is ready, with the order entries being saved locally on the phone. However, I need these registered data to be submitted directly into a transaction in SAP. Is there a way to make this integration? Is there any tutorial available for this?

entry.title: Re: exit variable with "E_TH_CHAS"
entry.content:
Hi,

I am not sure whether fully understand you question.

It seems that you have characteristics A (Company Code) and B (Book Currency) and you have a key figure K that uses B as the currency characteristic. This is why an aggregationlevel containing K also has to contain B.

It is possible to derive the currency value (it is a required field) from A, e.g. modeling B as an attribute of A. Set up a characteristic relationship of type 'derivation' use A a source and B as target. In the query you can drill-down by A, B and hide B in the query. In a new line, using Analysis Office, then the system derives the currency from the Company Code A, i.e. the required field for currency is automatically filled.

In other words, this problem can be solved using standard modeling. You don't need a variable. This would anyway not work since variables are replaced before the query is started, i.e. in new line scenarios this is too late.

Regards,

Gregor

entry.title: Re: Grant users read-only access to the context of a sap...
entry.content:
Only someone with ProcessAutomationAdmin role is allowed to update the context.

And if you use a User Token Exchange authentication in the destination than the call will know the user.

At least it should work 😺

entry.title: Re: Grant users read-only access to the context of a sap...
entry.content:
Only someone with ProcessAutomationAdmin role is allowed to update the context.

And if you use a User Token Exchange authentication in the destination than the call will know the user.

At least it should work 😺

entry.title: Re: Fire of Innovations: Highlights from SAP TechEd 2024

entry.title: Re: Setting up a Selection &status profile in QM
entry.content: There is cancel status field, just filter out and save your customization layout. You can see your saved layout when you entered QA32 again.

entry.title: Re: User principal certificate from trustworthy issuer is...

entry.title: SAP IDM privilige inheritance should ignore context of business role
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I try something, where I did not find a solution.

I have a business role with privileges for two repositories. Only one repository need an assignment context.

So is it possible, to assign the business role with a context and only one privilege inherit this context. The second privilege will be assigned to the user without context? Is there any possibility, to configure the link from privilege to role, to achieve this?

Why I want to this? When I assign the business role with different contexts the contextless privilege will be only one line in the mxi_link with the mcAssignedInheritCount > 1.

Thanks

SAP Identity Management

entry.title: Re: Calculation View - UPG BW4HANA 2021
entry.content:
Hi Francesco

 

Check the KBA-s:

2608634 Invalid definition of structured privilege when use HANA external view for modified composite provider
2250455 SAP DBTech JDBC 485 - Invalid definition of structured privilege: Invalid filter condition

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Elimination with quantities
entry.content:
Hi @FlorianRoll

Thank you for reply. I'm working with Elizabeth. 

The customer is implementing S/4HANA 2023 On Premise solution. Is your comment also valid for this product please?

When I try to put the breakdown type 1 for unit of measure, SAP shows the error message indicating to put 0 or 3.

If we choose 3, we will have several unit of measure per FS item (according to the unit of measure saved in ACDOCA) but we won't have an intercompany elimination per quantity/unit of measure (only the default unit of measure will be used during elimination).

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: SAP ERP Central Component
entry.content:
Does anyone have the tables and fields descriptions of SAP ECC( ERP Central Component)?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Data Migration Demystified: Legacy System Migration Workbench vs. SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
@MustafaBensan 

I am fully with your statement that LSMW is legacy and more modern approaches to data loads should be considered instead for data migration in SAP S/4HANA.
That it is not forbidden to use the LSMW is not my personal opinion. It is the result of the official statement from SAP, that can be read in SAP Note 2287723.
As long as the LSMW transaction os available in SAP S/4HANA, it can be used and customers unfortunately are still using the LSMW. The blog is to show the differences of both tools and to show that migration cockpit is the better solution for data migration purposes, that customers/consultants start using the migration cockpit. If someone still wants to use the LSMW they should really need to check if the offered SAP data migration program/method is still working in SAP S/4HANA and offers the full scope for SAP S/4HANA. Instead of spending days exploring SAP Notes and KBAs to perform tests to find out whether something is still working with the LSMW, it is better to use this time to familiarize yourself with the Migration Cockpit.

entry.content:

Thanks in advance!

Regards

SS

entry.title: Maximizing M&A Success: How SAP Solutions Drive Growth and Effectiveness
entry.content:
Maximizing M&A Success:  How SAP Solutions Drive Growth and Effectiveness

Authored by:  Christina Grace, SAP Global Finance Value Advisor & Marie Trojani, SAP Global HCM Value Advisor

Mergers and acquisitions (M&A) are complex transactions that can significantly alter the trajectory of a business. While they present opportunities for growth, diversification, and enhanced market presence, they also come with inherent challenges that can hinder success. One critical factor in navigating these challenges is the effective integration of systems, processes, people, and cultures. SAP offers a robust framework that can significantly enhance a company’s effectiveness for companies pursuing an M&A strategy. This blog explores how SAP facilitates successful M&A outcomes in the areas of Finance and HR and discusses potential inflection points in the journey to ensure success.

Understanding the M&A Landscape

Before delving into how SAP can assist during the M&A process, it's important to understand the typical M&A landscape. The process generally involves several phases:

  1. Planning and Strategy Development: Identifying potential targets and assessing strategic fit. This includes an assessment of current systems, people, and processes in both organizations. The goal should be to identify gaps and overlaps that could impact integration.  This phase also involves engaging key stakeholders from both organizations to ensure buy-in and prepare teams for the upcoming changes.
  2. Due Diligence: Analyzing financials, operations, and risks associated with the target company.  This analysis should provide insights into the target company’s strengths and weaknesses.  During this phase, data management tools can be used to perform scenario modeling of the two companies, set KPI goals, measure compliance, and ensure data harmonization.  A risk assessment should be performed to evaluate potential risks associated with the acquisition. Identifying risks early allows for proactive management strategies. That’s also at this stage that you can evaluate the cultural fit between the two companies.
  3. Integration and Strategy Management: Merging systems, processes, people, and cultures post-acquisition. Develop a comprehensive integration roadmap that outlines timelines, responsibilities, and key milestones. This roadmap should leverage GenAI integration capabilities to ensure a seamless transition. Prepare a training and support plan to educate employees about new systems and processes. Effective training will minimize disruptions and foster a sense of ownership among staff.  Real-time monitoring of the integration process is essential and allows for quick adjustments if any issues arise.  Establish feedback mechanisms to gather input from employees about the integration process. Utilize these insights to refine strategies and address concerns promptly. Particularly, HR concerns can appear quickly around job redundancies, salary gaps, talent retention for critical roles and employee morale.
  4. Post-Merger Evaluation: Assessing the success of the integration and overall M&A performance. After integration, evaluate the performance of the combined entity using advanced analytics tools. Assess whether M&A goals have been met and identify areas for further improvement, realizing greater synergies, and operating more efficiently.  Perform a cultural integration review by assessing employee engagement and satisfaction.  This allows companies to gauge the success of cultural integration, to gather insights, and to address any lingering issues.

Each phase presents unique challenges that SAP addresses with agility, transparency, and scalability.

The Role of SAP in M&A

SAP provides a comprehensive suite of integrated solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency, drive revenue growth, harmonize data, and improve real-time insights and overall business intelligence. Here’s how SAP Finance and HR solutions can specifically help companies pursuing an M&A strategy:

Seamless Integration of Systems

Challenge: One of the biggest hurdles in M&A is integrating disparate IT systems from merging organizations. Incompatible systems can lead to inefficiencies, data silos, and disruptions in business operations.

SAP Solution: SAP’s integrated platform enables organizations to unify disparate systems under one umbrella. With tools such as SAP S/4HANA, businesses can achieve real-time data integration and consistency, allowing for streamlined operations across the newly formed entity.  In the HR community, harmonizing different payroll, benefits, and performance management systems requires strategic planning and meticulous execution to avoid disruptions and maintain employee satisfaction.  This seamless integration reduces downtime and ensures continuity of service, which is critical during transitional phases.

Efficient Data Management

Challenge: During an M&A integration, organizations face an overwhelming amount of data that needs to be migrated, analyzed, and integrated. Poor data management can result in costly mistakes and compliance issues.

SAP Solution: SAP’s data management tools, including SAP Business Technology Platform, provide robust capabilities for data migration, cleansing, and integration. These solutions ensure that data from both companies are harmonized and accessible, allowing decision-makers to derive insights quickly and effectively. Real-time analytics further enable businesses to identify trends and make informed decisions swiftly.

Streamlined Financial Reporting

Challenge: Accurate financial reporting is essential during M&A, both for compliance and for assessing the financial health of the combined entity. However, multiple financial systems and reporting standards can complicate this process.

SAP Solution: SAP solutions offer integrated financial management tools that facilitate streamlined reporting and compliance with international financial standards. With SAP Analytics Cloud, businesses can create real-time financial dashboards, enabling stakeholders to monitor KPIs and other financial metrics seamlessly. This capability is crucial for transparent communication with investors, internal stakeholders, and regulatory bodies.

Enhanced Operational Efficiency

Challenge: Post-M&A, organizations often encounter operational redundancies and inefficiencies due to overlapping processes and systems.  Furthermore, redundancies and restructuring can lead to workforce reductions, which may result in the loss of valuable talent and institutional knowledge.

SAP Solution: SAP’s process automation capabilities can help identify and eliminate redundancies. For example, with SAP Ariba, companies can enhance procurement processes, while SAP SuccessFactors can streamline human resources management. HR must manage these transitions delicately, ensuring fair and compliant processes while maintaining operational continuity. These solutions foster operational efficiencies that lead to cost savings and improved productivity across the organization. 

Change Management Support

Challenge: M&A transactions often lead to significant challenges to company culture, processes, and personnel. Concerns about the unknown and resistance to change can derail integration efforts. 

SAP Solution:  Fostering employee engagement and loyalty can be key to overcoming these obstacles. Initiatives to support change management, such as training programs and team-building activities, are essential but must be carefully tailored to address the specific needs and concerns of the workforce.  SAP offers tools to support change management, including SAP Enable Now, which provides training and support resources for employees.  This tool allows organizations to create custom training materials and resources that can facilitate a smoother transition. By preparing employees for the changes ahead, companies can mitigate resistance and foster a more collaborative environment.

Risk Management and Compliance

Challenge: M&A transactions are inherently risky, and the complexities of integrating different compliance standards can lead to potential legal and regulatory issues.

SAP Solution: SAP’s risk management tools, such as SAP GRC (Governance, Risk, and Compliance), enable businesses to assess and manage risks effectively. These solutions provide a framework for identifying compliance gaps and ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements, thereby protecting the organization from potential liabilities.

Cultural Integration

Challenge: Merging different company cultures can be one of the most challenging aspects of M&A. Misalignment can lead to employee dissatisfaction and turnover.  M&A often herald significant organizational transformation, presenting numerous challenges for HR and employees. Merging distinct corporate cultures can lead to misalignment, confusion, and conflicts. HR must navigate the complex task of creating a cohesive environment where employees from both organizations feel valued and understood.

SAP Solution: While SAP solutions primarily focus on operational aspects, they can also support cultural integration indirectly. Tools like SAP SuccessFactors provide insights into employee engagement and performance, enabling leadership to address cultural challenges proactively. By fostering open communication and collaboration through these platforms, organizations can work towards aligning their cultures more effectively.

Job Security

Challenge: Another critical issue is job security. Employees often face anxiety and uncertainty about their future roles, leading to decreased morale and productivity. There is a higher risk for top talent to leave the company during times of uncertainty.

SAP Solution: Transparent communication from HR is vital to mitigate these concerns, as well as a comprehensive view into employee data such as competencies and job profiles. Analytics and AI can facilitate informed decisions and proactively alert if there are potential risks. Yet finding the balance between transparency and confidentiality can be challenging.

In navigating all of these challenges, Finance, HR and IT all play a crucial role in facilitating a smooth transition, fostering a positive organizational culture, and maintaining employee well-being and productivity during M&A activities.

Benefits of SAP Solutions in M&A

  • Efficiency: Streamlines operations and reduces integration time
  • Cost Savings: Minimizes redundancies and operational costs
  • Real-Time Insights: Provides data-driven decision-making capabilities
  • Risk Mitigation: Enhances compliance and governance
  • Employee Engagement: Supports smooth cultural integration through training and engagement tools

Conclusion

In today’s fast-paced business environment, the success of M&A hinges on effective integration and management of systems, people, data, and processes. In an era where adaptability and efficiency are paramount, embracing SAP Finance and HR solutions not only supports immediate M&A goals but also lays a solid foundation for sustained success in an ever-evolving marketplace.

SAP offers a comprehensive toolkit for companies navigating the multifaceted complexities and challenges of M&A, enabling organizations to streamline operations, enhance decision-making, and drive overall success.  By leveraging SAP’s integrated tools, companies can navigate the complexities of M&A with greater confidence and effectiveness. By facilitating integration, enhancing data management, and supporting operational efficiency, SAP helps organizations achieve their M&A objectives while laying the groundwork for long-term success.  As organizations continue to pursue growth through acquisitions, those that adopt SAP solutions will be well-positioned to realize the full potential of their M&A strategies, fostering a more agile and competitive future.

entry.title: Re: How does edoc_cockpit generate an XML?
entry.content:
Each eDocument implementation can have it differnet way.

But most common country dependent implementations are using Application Interface Framework (AIF).
If you are also using AIF, then you can explore BADI eDocument Interface Connector (EDOC_INTERFACE_CONNECTOR). There you will find your implementation/s and you can explore & debug code. Note that often the XML is created in initial eDocument status step, saved into the DB, and then this saved XML is used for preview in eDocument Cockpit. So you might not be able to debug preview action in some cases. You need to debug "submit" or other actions.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2024-10-07?
entry.content:
I’m delighted to introduce my first "What’s New" blog post, highlighting the SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model updates for October, with a focus on the newly released RFA types.

Let’s explore the most recent features and enhancements in SAP PaPM Cloud!

If you'd like to explore previous enhancements introduced by PaPM Cloud SM in the past months, you can search or use the relevant tag PaPMCloudWhatsNew .

 

Remote Function Adapter 

The latest enhancement in the RFA includes the release of two new RFA types: Accounts Payable Items and Accounts Receivable Items. These functionalities are aligned with those in SAP Profitability and Performance Management On-Premise. Users must have multiple lines per document, along with a grouping field, to determine which lines will be grouped and posted to the target ECC.

In the old RFA, we used to face performance issues. With the new RFA enhancement, users can write multiple lines per document, and the performance issues have been resolved.

For the step-by-step procedure on how you can establish connection, you may refer to this blog post:

Integration: Setup SAP PaPM Cloud to use RFA FI-GL and FI-GLI to post to your ECC.

 

Accounts Payable Items 

 

Accounts Receivable Items

 

Both RFA types, Accounts Payable Items and Accounts Receivable Items, utilize the BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST function. For more detailed information, refer to the official documentation: Account Payable Items | Account Receivable Items.

There have also been some updates in the logs when executing Remote Function Adapters that use BAPIs via the Cloud Connector.

When users expand the old message logs, they will now see all business errors and the generated document number.

With the new enhancements, logs will be displayed in the technical field FS_PER_MSG_TEXT_ column on the show screen, highlighting the specific row that triggers the business errors.

This change is part of a significant performance improvement in handling large data sets for the Remote Function Adapter.

I trust you found this blogpost enjoyable and informative regarding the new features of the SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model.

Thank you for being with us and prepare for more exciting updates in our forthcoming "What's New" series.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP : Enabling custom actions with a dialog for additional input fields

Hi All,

 

 


I added screenshots. I cannot read the records on the screen in the keys variable. what should i do?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Unable to connection BI Platform in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
This error is typically due to wrong login details or server connection issues.

Below could help to troubleshoot:
- Ensure your username and password are correct and you have the right permissions to access the BI platform.
- Make sure the server is operational. If it's down, contact your IT department or server provider.
- If accessing remotely, ensure your network connection is stable and your VPN is correctly configured.
- If using an outdated Analysis for Office version, update it to ensure compatibility with the BI platform.

entry.title: ABAP CERTIFICATION
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to do the ABAP certification exam but i don't feel ready, i have only read from the sap training hub . If anyone has dump files or sites i can do trial papers please share. Any tips will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: OpenXML crushes the database
entry.content:
If the XML is malformed, the select from OpenXML can crush the database (code below). I think this is a bug in the database. Can anyone confirm?

create variable l_xml xml;
set l_xml='<Order>
      <S_NAD>
        <D_3035>XX</D_3035>
        <C_C082>
          <D_3039>001569</D_3039>
          <D_3055/>
        <C_C082/>
      </S_NAD>
</Order>';

SELECT * FROM OpenXML( l_xml, '/Order')
    WITH ( D1 nchar(2) 'S_NAD/D_3035',
           D2 Nchar(35) 'S_NAD/C_C082[D_3055="9"]/D_3039' );

Database: SQL Anywhere 17.0.11.7432, UNIX, UTF-8

entry.title: Re: Modify mail text in work item
entry.content:
Hi, I haven't worked with PO Release in a long time, but this is what I would do:

1) Copy this task to a custom task

2) Edit your custom task to include the text you want

3) Replace TS20000168 in your workflow template with your custom task, ensuring that all bindings are consistent.

4) If you are executing TS20000168 via a standard SAP workflow, repeat this process - ie: copy the standard template to a new custom template

Please bear in mind, a lot of SAP-delivered workflows and tasks are examples; it's fine (and often very necessary!) to copy the SAP templates and tasks to your own versions.  

Good luck,

Sue

entry.title: Re: Unable to connection BI Platform in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
Hi HakanHaslaman,

Thanks for reply.

- Ensure your username and password are correct and you have the right permissions to access the BI platform. - I am able login BI launchpad(with SAP Authentication) without any issue.
- Make sure the server is operational. If it's down, contact your IT department or server provider. - there is no server is down.- 

-If accessing remotely, ensure your network connection is stable and your VPN is correctly configured. - We are connected with VPN
- If using an outdated Analysis for Office version, update it to ensure compatibility with the BI platform.: BO Version is 4.2 SP08 Patch 08 and Analysis for Office version 2.8.2000.1138

great. You can get the latest ADT plug-ins and the latest Eclipse client from here: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

OK, good luck.

Please let us know if you have further questions.

Kind regards, Wolfgang

entry.title: Save info in TXT file
entry.content:
Hi.

I have this:

 

  concatenate lv_ruta_down  '\' lv_filename into fname.
  open dataset fname for output in text mode encoding default.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    WRITE  'ERROR'.
    EXIT.
  endif.

  loop at t_bsik into gw_bsik.

*do some suff and concatenations
*and concatenate the final values

    concatenate
      'C'
      'XPTO'
      gw_bsik-WAERS
      l_cur
      gw_bsik-XBLNR
      into lv_line SEPARATED BY '|'.
      transfer lv_line to fname.

  endloop.
  close dataset fname.

 

 It goes to the end without any error, and the name is set to "c:\temp\fileresult.txt', but no file is created.

any clue?

entry.title: Re: Connect Multiple SAC Environment To One SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content: Just what I needed! Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: Save info in TXT file
entry.content:
I think you are mixing "Application server" and "Local directory" in your computer. "OPEN DATASET" + "TRANSFER" is usually used to handle files on Application server, not local files.

You can check AL11 and you will probably see the file with this name created there.

If you want to write file to local computer, then try method: 

cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download

entry.title: Re: Data transformation question - from date to duration
entry.content:
Hello vp_nbn,

thank you for your request and please excuse the delay of our response!

After internal discussion, we kindly ask you to open a ticket via SAP for Me (Login with S-User and Password) with as much information as possible, such as workspace id, what source system etc. This way, you will be in direct contact with our support team.

Here is a step-by-step guideline on how to open a ticket via SAP for Me. In case, you are facing issues in the ticket creation, feel free to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com or to our Customer Interaction Center.

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha (Virtual Customer Success Team - SAP Signavio)

entry.title: Unable to access C4C with SSO after renewing the Signature certificate.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In c4c, SSO signature certificate got expired so i got renewed certificate from security team and same i have uploaded in Common task -- Configure SSO --> Identity provider--> Signature certificate -- Upload certificate. Save and active. After processing this steps, i asked to user to login with SSO link but user still facing SAML 2 error.

I have also uploaded newly updated certificate in Common task -- configure OAuth 2.0 identity provider -- Signature certificate -- upload certificate. After processing this steps facing the same error.

Could you please suggest me to rectify this error.

 

 

Thank you.

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Build App and SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hi Maria,

We have also build a professional app by Build Apps with all PM functions and used BTP and SAP Integration Suite to connect to the ERP. You can check it from below url. 

An alternative suggestion, you can also create Maintenance Notification from the app to SAP ERP and in SAP, planners can convert it into a Work Order. This may be a easier and a quick way as notifications require less information than work orders while creating.

https://riftsoft.com/Products/RiftMobile

Best Regards,

Ali

entry.content:
Hi all,

Please could anyone with knowledge around the Integration Suite Mission, using a free Trial, let me know if the reason why I cannot progress past the ODATA connection setup as it cannot connect to the target "https://refapps-espm-ui-cf.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/espm-cloud-web/espm.svc" is because my trial account is in Singapore. Should it be in USA to be able to do the exercises? I saw a different post to that effect, but not sure it is relevant to my case. I thought asking first before going to the trouble to re-set up my trial account.

Thanks in advance for any assistance!

V

entry.title: Aggregate SUM works wrongly
entry.content:
Hello i have created a Report to see the Sales Orders, Sales Order Items, Good Issue Date and the net value. 
In my Cube view i defined the net value with @DefaultAggregation: #SUM which should sum up the net value.

In my story i display the good issue date in hierarchy (YEAR-MONTH-DAY) or drilling to see the months. 
The problme is
i have on day 19.09 -- 14 different positions and i see the toal value of SUM on month but also on the day 19.09 but it is wrong. 
Each value is calculate * 30 i guess for the month..

I am expecting the sum only from the net values -- so no multiplication just the sum of all rows of all salesorderitems but it does not work with this single field set as @DefaultAggregation: SAP Summit 
Please can one shed some light into it.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting Business Partner Key Mapping Issues
entry.content:
Thank you - very detailed and clear explanation!

I'd have a question based on the following background: there are already existing BP / vendors in the target system and a new interface is implemented, the numbers of BP and vendors are the same in both source and target system. Nevertheless, to update any already existing BP / vendors, we will need to manually maintain key mapping for the existing ones (different UUID). Would it also work / be possible to only manually maintain the key mapping in the target system?

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Release Date - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello @samupeinado93 

There is no CDS view for standard table EREV which is released, however CDS I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 does contain the processing status information.

PO CDS Views  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/6d471dfc743048c3891601fa8ab0dc1e.html?version=2408.500 

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: I can't find any option to export the chart view to P...
entry.content:
Hello @Amit66 

Currently, exporting charts in PDF format is not supported. However, you can export the data in Excel format.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HANA memor in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Nitin, where do you find this DB usage info, in SAP4Me? Can you provide a path on how to reach this screenshot? Regards, George

entry.title: Re: SAC table add/remove dimension members via Script
entry.content:
Hi ,

Good day!!

Hope the below code helps.. Although this is pretty basic 🙂

//Create two buttons "Show" and "Hide"
//Write this code in the OnClick after creating the button name "Show"
var Dim  = [AccountA,AccountB,AccountC];
//Iterate the dimensions and set the dimensions in Column
for ( var i = 0; i < Dim.length; i++)
{	
	Table_1.addDimensionToColumns(Dim[i]);	
}

//Write this code in the OnClick of button "Hide"
var Dim1  = [AccountA,AccountB,AccountC];
//Iterate the dimensions and set the dimensions in Column
for ( var i = 0; i < Dim1.length; i++)
{	
	Table_1.removeDimension(Dim1[i]);	
}

 Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

The Ask

entry.title: Transporting cross client object- generated from SLXT
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

I have one problem with transport I have maintained German translations in German language for industry sector(Business partner) via Se63 and then from SLXT I created the transport of copies which has all my translation that I created. Now I am using the standard method to move the TR from Dev system to QA system but changes are not reflecting in QA system even though the TR is released.
Is there any leads how can I transport the translations from one system to another?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Error when generating the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APP...
entry.content: It looks like from that error log that your backend system cannot connect to the Mobile Services endpoint.  Is it possible your network blocks outbound traffic from your backend system?  I would suggest you start by checking with your internal network folks about the connection error.

entry.title: Re: Usage of "JustAsk" within the story in a separate panel.
entry.content:
Hi Francois,

Good day!! Sorry for the delayed reply 🙂

  • We were planning to create a user friendly Story where the User can Select or enter the questions in a text box.
  • The module is related to PM where all the Equipment and Notification related details will be uploaded in the model
  • User can ask the cross questions to the existing data.

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: From technical view what's the difference between create a Subscriptions and create an instance?
entry.content:
1) Does create ainstance mean the application will be deployed into the sub account and run in the runtime belong to the sub account ? user actually gets a new deployment of the service running in his own sub account ?

2) Does create a subscription mean the application still run on provider's runtime which belong to the provider's subaccount.   user only gets a url to access the application 

Does my understand right ?

If right ?  How to write the application to work in  the two different mode (plan ? )

entry.title: Re: How to find reasons cloud usage GB - S/4HANA Cloud HA...
entry.content:
Hi Nitin,

The CALM screenshot is pointing to your customizing tenant (I looked it up). If the first screen is indeed from your production, you are looking at two different tenants, so you can't compare them. Please try digging into the apps I referenced like the technical monitoring and other apps.

Checking the memory (I guess production), it jumped up on ~July 19, again on July 23 and to its currently level ~ September 18.

So you can investigate activity on those dates.

If the apps and links don't give you additional insights, I would recommend to create a support ticket and request assistance.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: AVC_characteristics value assignment_could not change...
entry.content:
Hello @thangarajthomas 

I assume that the characteristic is already used for example in some dependency. If characteristics are assigned to dependency objects it is not possible to change as you can see, please remove the dependencies first, then you will be able to change the characteristic value assignment 

You can set the 'single value' indicator only if a maximum of one valuation exists for each object. The conversion cannot be carried out if multiple values were assigned to objects with the characteristic

You can use app 'Display Where Characteristics Are Used' and check where the characteristic is used.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Part 10 - Assigning Multiple Policies to an API Proxy
entry.content: THANK YOU BROTHER

entry.title: latest people profile
entry.content:
Hi, we can see many new features related to latest people profile which we don't want to turn it on. and we still want to continue using old people profile.

Till when we can use old people profile which are more comfortable with.

Also, We understood that this will become universal by 2025, but we just want to know is there any possibility to turn it off in the backend for us when made universal.

entry.title: Re: Number range maintenance

entry.title: Re: Welcome Title at SAP C4C Home Screen
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have created a SAP Influence for this topic, please vote: Welcome Message in Home Page 

Clóvis Müller

entry.title: Re: How to search Physical Stock in EWM Warehouse Monitor...
entry.content:
What he said...

There are two different nodes for physical stock

- one under "Stock and Bin --> Storage Bin --> Physical Stock" - here you can search by selecting information like storage type, bin, etc (and product as well)

- the other under "Stock and Bin --> Physical Stock" - here you can only search using the product.

From the looks of it you do not use the standard monitor ("SAP"), but an adapted monitor, which does not include all nodes. So you either have to switch to the standard monitor (using the default values icon) or ask that the adapted monitor gets extended.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: Requisitioner-AFNAM missing in SAP Std PO integration...
entry.content: You can check at launchpad SAP

entry.title: Re: reservations for materials for a cost center in another company code
entry.content:
Hi @2831990 this is possible provided both the company code assigned same controlling area using MIGO you can post goods issue try 221 movement type also maintain OBYA settings between company codes involved.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Error when generating the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APP...
entry.content: A ticket has already been opened with SAP to check if any firewall was blocking the connection on port 443, but even after SAP's resolution, the problem persisted. What else would be interesting to check? Could you guide me?

entry.title: SAP Developer News: TechEd Day 1
entry.content:
Description

SAP TechEd General

  • News Guide: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide.html
  • TechEd Watch Live: https://www.sap.com/events/teched.html

Build Code Enhancements for Developers

  • Application Development and Automation News: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/application-development-and-automation.html
  • SAP Build Extensibility Wizard: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-extensibility-wizard-for-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13867427
  • SAP Build Code Sessions: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/virtual/flow/sap/te24/catalog/page/catalog?tab.day=20241008&search.offeringsproducts=1698907352855001TA5c

AI Innovations – Part 1

  • Artificial Intelligence News: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/ai.html
  • AI Sessions: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/virtual/flow/sap/te24/catalog/page/catalog?tab.day=20241009&search.track=1692371026432002VTW0

AI Innovations – Part 2

  • Artificial Intelligence News: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/ai.html
  • AI Sessions: https://www.sap.com/events/teched/virtual/flow/sap/te24/catalog/page/catalog?tab.day=20241009&search.track=1692371026432002VTW0

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 TechEd Intro
1:09 Build Code Enhancements for Developers
3:30 AI Innovations – Part 1
4:33 AI Innovations – Part 2

Transcript

[Intro] Well, a developer in his houseboat, innovating cutting-edge tech from the high seas. He could have kept his anchors away, but he didn't.

[DJ] So while the crew were at lunch we've snuck into the studios to record this item on the couch. So we're at TechEd as we can see here I've got some a card here and one of the items announced at TechEd as you may know is that there are new capabilities that have been added and will be added to SAP Build the complete solution for building end-to-end extensions on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud and on other line of business applications. There are three here written down that I want to highlight.

There's a new extension wizard and it allows you to jump directly from SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition straight to SAP Build. Why is that important? Because there's a lot of context within the context of the application and that context objects events and so on business data is super important not to lose that so this new extension wizard which is available for building side-by-side and on stack extensions allows that jump including the context there are new generative AI capabilities with dual coming in this quarter for example alongside the already existing code generation facilities, there are or there will be code explanation facilities and also document search. I think they're great complements to what already exists.

On the low code arena, there are also dual enhancements to help with the creation of UIs and workflow automation.

And last but not least, there's now direct access or there will be, by the end of this year, direct access from SAP Build to ABAP development environments in the cloud and on BTP. So basically the whole idea is that this is one step closer to a more unified development environment. You can jump from the lobby to SAP Build Code, SAP Build Apps and now to specific ABAP development environments and this helps enormously with success for teams especially in fusion development contexts. Anyway check out the announcements from SAP TechEd for more details on these new SAP build capabilities.

[Nora] There's a lot happening with AI at TechEd at the moment and you've heard a lot of news and I'm just going to try to put as much as possible into the next couple of minutes. So there has been a lot of rumor on the SAP Foundation model for a while now and it's getting real and if you want to know more about the SAP Foundation model you should definitely check out the session AI 102 on Wednesday. SAP Foundation Model and Knowledge Graph, where you can learn about the SAP Foundation Model and how it can actually interpret structured data and fill in missing data points. Then we also have a lot of new features in the Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core. Mainly we have new models coming up, so we will have the IBM Granite model series. We will also have the Dali 3 model and the Amazon Titan image generator model. Those will all be available until the end of 2024. We also have other new features of Generative AI Hub, for example, the orchestration capability, including prompt templates and data masking. And then we also have some new features with Joule and Kevin is going to tell you more about that.

[Kevin] SAP is going to expand and elevate Joule's capabilities to drive business innovation by providing SAP Joule Studio to create custom skills for Joule, but it also will integrate Joule with SAP HANA Cloud to help you generate code for SAP HANA Cloud and help you work easier with SAP HANA Cloud as well. The SAP Cloud SDK for AI was available for Python already, but now we got that for Java, JavaScript, and ABAP, helping you to integrate the capabilities of SAP Generative AI Hub of SAP AI Core directly into your business enterprise applications.

entry.title: Is there a specified timeframe within which Purchase Order (PO) approval tasks in Fiori Inbox?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there a specified timeframe within which Purchase Order (PO) approval tasks must be completed in the Fiori Inbox? It appears that if a PO remains unapproved for an extended period, the task no longer appears in the approver's inbox.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Product Availability Check: storage location
entry.content:
Hello Garcia, I hoping ATP will only check the storage location which is mentioned in sales order.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud - Blog 5
entry.content:
Hello,
  When I tried to bring in the Master Data (from the Dimension Table) via the SAC Connection created in Datasphere using the Coud Data Integration connection in Datasphere, the Hierarchy is not brought into Datasphere from SAC. I tried via both the Remote Tables and Data Flow, the Hierarchy is not brought in from SAC to Datasphere using the Cloud Data Integration (CDI) connection. Can you support on how to bring the Hierarchy using the CDI.

entry.title: Re: BAPI to park document in FV50 and FV50L
entry.content:
PRELIMINARY_POSTING_FB01 .

Try using this FM and pass FV50 in importing parameter I_TCODE and also in table T_BKPF in tcode field.

entry.title: Trial SAP BO 4.3
entry.content:
Hello everyone !

I wanted to know if it is possible to install the trial version of SAP BO 4.3
If yes, from what link can we do it?
THANKS !

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud - Show country-specific referenc...
entry.content: Dear @Vijayendra, In the link you provided I can see our field listed as "Dependent on company code", however, I don't see how to enable this field in our case. Our country is "Dominican Republic", which as such is not localized by SAP, but we're using CLT to achieve the same. My question is specifically how to enable this field in our Dominican Republic Company Code...

entry.title: Re: How to resolve resnponse from a Web Service call in a...
entry.content:
Just create a custom script.

  • Input of type Any
  • Output of type Any

And then the code is just:

return myInput.inputs[0].d.results[0].QuantityInBaseUnit;

You'll of course have to bind the output of the Call Web Service to the custom script.

But all of this is if you want to store it in a variable. You don't need a custom script because you can use the expression editor to get the value you want directly (below is me using the root of Northwind service to get name of the first entity):

entry.title: Re: Static images are not displayed correctly in SAP Android preview
entry.content: This issue is solved.

entry.title: Re: Quick hacks: Displaying fields
entry.content:
😺

P.S.: Never thought of you as lazy, but good to know

entry.title: Re: ABAP: Fast JSON Serialization
entry.content: Any recent (performance-wise) breakthrough in generic JSON serialization / deserialization? 😬
